locations.name: Art studio
descriptions: This is the art studio that Emma's mom has in the house

locations.name: Kitchen
descriptions: The kitchen of the house
It's not huge, but it's not the smallest kitchen in the world either.
A lot of light comes in through the windows

locations.name: Garden
descriptions: The garden of the house
It is relatively small, about 5 square meters.

items.name: A green hammer
descriptions: A small green hammer
It is just a toy and you cannot break anything with it

items.name: A grey hammer
descriptions: A big grey hammer that can be used to break things
It is so heavy...

items.name: Key
descriptions: A key to open a lock
It is golden
There is a strange coat of arms engraved on it

items.name: Lock
descriptions: A strong lock with a coat of arms engraved on it
It seems that it cannot be opened with your bare hands

items.name: Turtle
descriptions: A small turtle
Emma's pet
Emma calls it 'Hojita'

characters.name: Laura
descriptions: A woman in her 40s
She is Emma's mom
She is an artist, and loves oil painting

player.name: Emma
descriptions: A teenager of average height
She is looking for her pet 'Hojita'
